name: Garlic-Parmesan Crisps
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix the butter and garlic salt until well blended.
2. Split each pita into two rounds.
3. Spread each round with the butter mixture.
4. Sprinkle with Parmesan and basil.
5. Cut each round into 6 wedges.
6. Place on an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Bake at 325 degrees for 8-10 minutes, or until crisp.
Yield: 4 dozen.
